sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48153" key="qeo/glwssos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-γλωσσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48153.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the tongue of a god</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γυναῖκες</foreign>, of poetesses, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.26</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip. Thess.).</sense> </entryFree>
